text: Moving from the first scene into the second, I feel a subtle transformation. In the busy room of chairs and people preparing for a talk or presentation, I sense anticipation, perhaps a little nervousness, as though all of us are about to be swept into a new experience. Shifting to the colorful wall with "R+D" and poetic words glowing on the screens, I feel contemplative and inspired—here, reflection is encouraged, and each phrase seems to invite me to ponder the unknown. Uncertainty is not to be feared, but explored. I feel both the curiosity of gathering with others and a private inner dialogue sparked by these immersive environments.
